sensitivity.name: Public
sensitivity.description: Information intended for public release with no access restrictions.

sensitivity.name: Confidential
sensitivity.description: Sensitive business information such as contracts, financials, or strategy documents.

retention.name: Employee Records (HR)
retention.description: Personnel files, payroll records, and employment contracts.

retention.name: Customer Personal Data (GDPR)
retention.description: Customer personal data collected for support, sales, or marketing purposes.
